post.summary: Get a matrix of distances and durations between multiple locations.

locations.description: The waypoints to use for the matrix as an array of longitude/latitude pairs in WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

destinations.description:
The indices represent the position of the locations in the list.
For example, if you have a list of five locations, and you want to specify the first and fourth locations as destinations,
you would use the indices [0,3].
By default, all locations are set as destinations.
This allows you to specify which locations in your list should be treated as destinations in the matrix calculation.

sources.description:
the Source parameter can take a list of indices that refer to the list of locations.
The indices represent the position of the locations in the list. For example,
if you have a list of five locations and you want to specify the first and fourth locations as sources,
you would use the indices [0,3].
By default, all locations are set as sources.
This allows you to specify which locations in your list should be treated as sources in the matrix calculation.

id.description: An aritrary identifier for this request. It will be returned in the response.

resolveLocations.description:
Specifies whether given locations are resolved or not. If the parameter value set to true, 
every element in destinations and sources will contain a name element that identifies the name of the closest street. 
Default is false.

ApiKey.description: API Key needed to access the endpoints. API Key is passed in the request header.
ApiKey.name: X-API-KEY
